text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Thanks. I set a new personal best again today. It
seems like my speed is steadily improving.

text_block_list.name: Security Captain
text_block_list.text:
Yes, such magnificent development is the fruit of
your diligent effort, Your Highness.

text_block_list.name: Security Captain
text_block_list.text:
Your trainer's guidance also appears to be quite
appropriate.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Trainer's guidance really is incredible... It's the
real deal.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
And Trainer is incredibly astute at identifying
where I need improvement as well. My progress
has noticeably increased since we joined forces.

text_block_list.name: Security Captain
text_block_list.text:
Oh! But of course Your Highness's efforts are the
greatest impetus. I merely thought your trainer's
contributions are worthy of some praise.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Far more than "some." It's undoubtedly thanks to
Trainer that I'm able to strive like this.

text_block_list.name: Security Captain
text_block_list.text:
If Your Highness thinks so highly, then I must also
offer my deepest gratitude.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, I have to get even better. That's surely the
best way to show my appreciation!
